title: Open the ACB System Overview Screen in the System HMI
summary: Access the ACB System overview screen in the System HMI to view the tilt-tray system layout and the color-coded status of each bin.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to navigate within the System HMI to the ACB System overview screen and confirm the tilt-tray system layout and color-coded bin status display.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate the System HMI to the ACB System overview screen and verify that the expected overview display is shown.

visual_references.description: Screen artifact from the System HMI section associated with the ACB System overview screen showing system status information.
System HMI screen showing the ACB System Overview interface referenced in Figure 4-1.
Legend for the ACB System Overview HMI screen, identifying the meaning of indicators shown on the system overview display.

steps.title: Open the System HMI
steps.purpose: Start from the System HMI so the documented navigation path to the ACB System overview screen can be followed.
steps.expected_result: The System HMI is open and available for navigation.
steps.healthy_condition: The System HMI interface is visible and ready for user input.
steps.failure_condition: The System HMI cannot be opened or is not available for navigation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the ACB System overview-related System HMI screen artifact to confirm you are working within the correct HMI context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The System HMI is not available or cannot be opened.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.
Artifact appears on page 31 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_1_acb_system_overview_screen.

steps.title: Press SMALLS
steps.purpose: Enter the SMALLS navigation path used to reach the ACB System overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The HMI advances into the SMALLS area or menu path.
steps.healthy_condition: The SMALLS selection is accepted and the next navigation options are available.
steps.failure_condition: The SMALLS option is not available or does not respond.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the Smalls System Overview Screen artifact as a reference for the SMALLS area reached through this navigation path.

stop_or_escalate_if: The documented menu options are not available in the System HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu.

steps.title: Select ACB from the drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Choose the ACB option required by the documented navigation path.
steps.expected_result: The ACB option is selected and the ACB-specific options are available.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down menu contains "ACB" and the selection is accepted.
steps.failure_condition: The "ACB" option is missing or cannot be selected.
stop_or_escalate_if: The documented menu options are not available in the System HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu.

steps.title: Select ACB1 - AMT TT
steps.purpose: Choose the documented ACB option that opens the ACB System overview screen.
steps.instruction: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.
steps.expected_result: The ACB1 - AMT TT selection is accepted and the ACB System overview screen opens.
steps.healthy_condition: The "ACB1 - AMT TT" option is available and leads to the ACB System overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The "ACB1 - AMT TT" option is missing or selecting it does not open the expected screen.

actions.label: Choose ACB1 - AMT TT
actions.exact_action: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

stop_or_escalate_if: The documented menu options or screen names are not available in the System HMI.
The ACB System overview screen does not display after following the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

steps.title: Verify the ACB System overview screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Confirm that the correct destination screen has opened and that it shows the expected system status information.
steps.instruction: Verify that the ACB System overview screen is displayed and shows the tilt-tray system layout with a color-coded status of each bin.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System overview screen is open and displays the tilt-tray system layout and color-coded bin statuses.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed screen matches the ACB System overview and shows the tilt-tray layout with color-coded status for each bin.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed screen is not the ACB System overview screen or it does not show the tilt-tray layout and color-coded bin status information.

actions.label: Confirm ACB overview display
actions.exact_action: Verify that the ACB System overview screen is displayed and shows the tilt-tray system layout with a color-coded status of each bin.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Compare the displayed screen to the ACB System overview-related screen artifact showing system status information.
Use Figure 4-1 to confirm the ACB System Overview interface is the screen currently displayed.
Use the legend to interpret indicators and color-coded status elements shown on the ACB System overview screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System overview screen does not display after following the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The ACB System overview screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and a color-coded status of each bin.
Artifact appears on page 31 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_1_acb_system_overview_screen.
Figure 4-1 appears on page 32 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_2_building_overview_screen.
Figure 4-2 appears on page 32 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_2_building_overview_screen.

success_criteria: The ACB System overview screen is open.
The displayed screen shows the tilt-tray system layout.
The displayed screen shows a color-coded status of each bin.
healthy_conditions: The option "ACB1 - AMT TT" is available.
The ACB System overview screen displays the tilt-tray system layout and color-coded bin statuses.
failure_conditions: The documented menu options or screen names are not available in the System HMI.
The ACB System overview screen does not display after following the documented navigation path.
The displayed screen does not show the tilt-tray system layout and color-coded status of each bin.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the documented menu options or screen names are not available in the System HMI.
Escalate if the ACB System overview screen does not display after following the documented navigation path.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: ACB System overview-related System HMI screen showing system status information.
Legend for interpreting indicators and color-coded status on the ACB System overview screen.
Reference for the SMALLS area used in the navigation path.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: To access the "ACB System" overview screen, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. The ACB System overview screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and a color-coded status of each bin.
